mapper.select:
SELECT c.id AS contestId, c.title, c.subtitle, c.description, c.start_time AS startTime, c.end_time AS endTime, c.rule_type AS ruleType, c.is_public AS isPublic FROM contest c WHERE c.is_del = 0
AND ( c.is_public = 1
OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM resource_permission rp WHERE rp.resource_type = 'CONTEST' AND rp.resource_id = c.id AND rp.user_id = #{userId} AND rp.is_del = 0) OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM contest_register_rel crr WHERE crr.contest_id = c.id AND crr.user_id = #{userId} AND crr.is_del = 0) OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM class_contest_rel ccr INNER JOIN class_student_rel csr ON ccr.class_id = csr.class_id WHERE ccr.contest_id = c.id AND csr.user_id = #{userId} AND ccr.is_del = 0 AND csr.is_del = 0)
)
AND NOW() < c.start_time AND NOW() >= c.start_time AND NOW() <= c.end_time AND NOW() > c.end_time
AND c.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{titleKeyword}, '%')
AND c.rule_type = #{ruleType}
AND c.start_time >= #{startTimeFrom} AND c.end_time <= #{endTimeTo} ORDER BY c.start_time DESC, c.id DESC

SELECT cpr.sort_order AS sortOrder, p.pid, p.title FROM contest_problem_rel cpr INNER JOIN problem p ON cpr.problem_id = p.id WHERE cpr.contest_id = #{contestId} AND cpr.is_del = 0 AND p.is_del = 0 ORDER BY cpr.sort_order ASC

SELECT s.submission_no, s.language, s.status, s.verdict, s.score, s.submit_time, u.id AS user_id, u.username, u.nickname, cpr.sort_order AS problem_sort_order, p.pid AS problem_pid, p.title AS problem_title FROM contest_submission cs INNER JOIN submission s ON cs.submission_id = s.id INNER JOIN user_info u ON s.user_id = u.id INNER JOIN problem p ON s.problem_id = p.id LEFT JOIN contest_problem_rel cpr ON cpr.contest_id = cs.contest_id AND cpr.problem_id = s.problem_id AND cpr.is_del = 0 WHERE cs.contest_id = #{contestId} AND cs.is_del = 0 AND s.is_del = 0 ORDER BY s.submit_time DESC, s.id DESC

SELECT s.id, s.user_id, s.problem_id, s.score, s.verdict, s.submit_time FROM contest_submission cs INNER JOIN submission s ON cs.submission_id = s.id WHERE cs.contest_id = #{contestId} AND cs.is_del = 0 AND s.is_del = 0 AND s.status = 'Finished' ORDER BY s.submit_time ASC
SELECT u.id, u.username, u.nickname FROM contest_register_rel crr INNER JOIN user_info u ON crr.user_id = u.id WHERE crr.contest_id = #{contestId} AND crr.is_del = 0 AND u.is_del = 0
